input:
Instead, they should raise their voices so as not to hear it. This is not much different from dictatorial regimes jamming other nations’ radio stations to keep their populations ignorant of what is taking place elsewhere, or indeed of oppression in their own countries. But the Qur’ān had its attraction even to the most outspoken enemies of Islam. They realized that Muhammad spent some time every night in worship reading the Qur’ān in prayer. Therefore, protected by the cover of darkness, some of them sat just outside his house, listening to the Qur’ān being recited inside.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 12: Difficulties in Abundance

output.scene_title: Enemies of Islam Listen to the Quran
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 12: Difficulties in Abundance

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Enemy of Islam
characters.appearance: Young adult, dark skin, athletic build. Wearing dark, worn-out garments, simple headscarf. Huddled on the ground in the shadows, attempting to listen to the sounds coming from inside the house.

output.moral_lesson: Even in darkness, the light of true knowledge can guide us towards the right path.
output.narrative_text: Enemies of Islam would often try to listen to the Quran being recited by the Prophet. They were drawn to the beauty and power of the Quran, even though they opposed Islam.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, face not visible. Enemies of Islam shown in silhouette, attempting to listen in secret.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Evening scene in a 7th century Makkah mud-brick home. A man in white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing at an open doorway with warm golden moonlight streaming behind him. On the ground outside, a young adult in dark garments, simple headscarf, huddled in the shadows, attempting to listen. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Low-angle shot, looking up. Soft blue-green palette. No modern objects.
